zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯時，他的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby49歲，母親Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby23歲。他於1270年與Lady Anne Durward結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1287年12月20日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland于大约1240年出生在英国英格兰艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯时，他的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby49岁，母亲Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby23岁。他于1270年与Lady Anne Durward结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1287年12月20日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland was born about 1240, in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 49 and his mother, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, was 23. He married Lady Anne Durward in 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 20 December 1287, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland est né environ 1240, à Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Durward en 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1287, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Hinckley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England: Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland um 1240 in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 49 und seine Mutter Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby 23. Er hat 1270 Lady Anne Durward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1287 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Anne Durward nel 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 20 dicembre 1287, nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Ferrers Constable of Scotlandが約1240年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウッドハム フエレルズで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは49歳，母Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derbyは23歳であった。1270年にLady Anne Durwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1287年12月20日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 우드함 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1270년 Lady Anne Durward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 12월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Durward em 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1287, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland родился около 1240 г. в местности вудхам фиррирс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Durward в 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 20 декабря 1287 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности хинккли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Anne Durward en 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
